title: What's in the Cards for Equinix (EQIX) This Earnings Season?
text: While robust data-center demand and expansionary efforts are likely to have aided Equinix's (EQIX) Q2 earnings, high interest expense might have hurt it.

title: This 4.1%-Yielding Dividend Stock Just Got a Whole Lot Safer
text: Digital Realty secured a joint venture for two of its data centers. The deal brings in a meaningful amount of cash, which should put the dividend on a firmer foundation.

title: 3 REITs to Weather-Proof Your Portfolio in Any Market Condition
text: Real estate investment trusts, or REITs, remain a mainstay for diversified retail portfolios. REITs, traded on public exchanges like other stocks, typically represent a bundle of properties managed by a central company.

title: Equinix: Take Advantage Of The AI Trend
text: The AI boom is driving tech valuations high, but data centers, crucial to the AI ecosystem, could offer investment opportunities without premium valuations. Equinix, a global data center player, is expected to see solid earnings growth due to high demand, despite potential risks from tenant diversification and high maintenance costs. The company's strong underlying growth and potential upside from the AI trend could make it a worthy investment.

title: Could Equinix Make A Potential Short Leg Of An AI Pairs Trade?
text: Data center REITs are thought of as key infrastructure for the roll out of AI, but this thinking is flawed. Their position within the AI supply chain results in low pricing power and high maintenance costs which inevitably lead to sub-par results. I investigate the possibility of constructing an AI pairs trade with Equinix forming the short leg of that trade.

title: The Retirees' Dividend Portfolio: John And Jane's June 2023 Taxable Account Update
text: The Taxable Account generated $2,111.31 of dividend income for June 2023 compared with $1,825.40 of dividend income for June 2022. The Taxable Account had a balance of $533.9K as of June 30, 2023, vs. $493.5K on June 30, 2022. The annualized cost basis yield is 5.44%. Five companies in the Taxable portfolio paid increased dividends or paid a special dividend during the month of June.

title: These 3 Dividend Machines Can Add Some Steady Sizzle to Your Summer Stock Buys

title: REITs Lead Quarter-End Rally
text: U.S. equity markets closed-out a volatile first-half at their highest-levels of the year as investors cheered data showing continued resilience in economic activity alongside further signs of cooling inflationary pressure. Rebounding from its worst week since March, the S&P 500 advanced 2.3% to close at its highest-levels since April 2022. The Mid-Cap 400 and Small-Cap 600 each rallied over 4%. Lifted by a recovery in the most beaten-down property sectors, real estate equities led the rally on the week. The Equity REIT Index advanced 4.3% while Mortgage REITs surged 6%.
